fields.title: Senior Lifeguard
fields.description: Supervise the main outdoor pool at Sunburst Holiday Park over the summer season. Responsible for guest safety, team briefings and rescue drills.

fields.title: Guest Services Assistant
fields.description: First point of contact for arriving guests at reception. Booking queries, check-ins and general park information.

fields.title: Ride Operator — Orbit Coaster
fields.description: Operate Galactic's flagship coaster. Run the pre-opening safety checks, manage dispatch timing and handle guest communications.

fields.title: Events Coordinator
fields.description: Plan and run weekly entertainment for resort guests at Azure Beach Resort. Kids clubs, evening shows and seasonal themed events.

fields.title: Adventure Instructor
fields.description: Lead high ropes, climbing and kayak sessions for school and corporate groups. Instructor qualifications required.

fields.title: Food and Beverage Team Member
fields.description: Join the restaurant team at Azure Beach Resort. Breakfast service, bar shifts and weekend brunches.
